allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('Pillow available'\)")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path

templates_dir = Path\('/c/Code/Comfy/workflow_templates/site/src/content/templates'\)

tags = set\(\)
models = set\(\)
creators = set\(\)
total_templates = 0

for f in templates_dir.glob\('*.json'\):
    try:
        with open\(f\) as fp:
            data = json.load\(fp\)
            total_templates += 1
            if 'tags' in data and data['tags']:
                tags.update\(data['tags']\)
            if 'models' in data and data['models']:
                models.update\(data['models']\)
            if 'username' in data and data['username']:
                creators.add\(data['username']\)
    except:
        pass

print\(f"Total templates: {total_templates}"\)
print\(f"Unique tags: {len\(tags\)}"\)
print\(f"Unique models: {len\(models\)}"\)
print\(f"Unique creators: {len\(creators\)}"\)
EOF)
Bash(cd C:/Code/Comfy/workflow_templates/site && npx astro check 2>&1 | tail -40)
Bash(cd C:/Code/Comfy/workflow_templates/site && timeout 20 npx astro dev --port 4322 2>&1 | tail -30)
